label: system_version
notes: Current package/version identifier; populated from src/version.py.

label: app_mode
notes: Local desktop mode only; public-hosting and client-registry modes have been removed.

label: config_backend
notes: SQLITE is the v10 runtime source of truth; CSV/JSON/YAML remain import-export adapters.

label: config_file
notes: Active Plan Data CSV for the local browser session.

label: json_config_file
notes: Optional JSON backend file.

label: yaml_config_file
notes: Optional YAML backend file.

label: output_dir
notes: Local output folder for generated workbook, PDF, and diagnostics.

label: local_plan_data_dir
notes: Optional local Plan Data source folder for command-line builds. UI-selected folders are posted by the browser per build.

label: enabled
notes: Enable web dashboard routes in src/server/.

label: host
notes: Local desktop host. Public/LAN binding has been removed from this package.

label: port
notes: Dashboard port. Open this TCP port in the local OS firewall.

label: encryption_enabled
notes: YES encrypts API keys in SQLite/secret store. Requires cryptography package for strong encryption.

label: secrets_store
notes: Local encrypted/obfuscated API key storage for optional Plan Chat and pricing keys.
The default UI runs builds immediately. Enable queue only when using a worker.
Shared operational settings used by tools and APIs.

label: nightly_enabled
notes: YES enables scheduled/manual nightly price refresh tool.

label: nightly_time
notes: Preferred local refresh time for scheduler/cron.

label: snapshot_retention_days
notes: Historical price snapshot retention.

label: target_allocation_file
notes: Optional target allocation file. Local input folder is searched first.

label: security_master_file
notes: Ticker-to-asset-class map. Local input folder is searched first.

label: rebalance_threshold_pct
notes: Report assets outside target allocation by this absolute threshold.

label: pricing_mode
notes: CACHE = use any cache first
column7: even stale; LIVE = prefer live providers before cache/fallback; OFFLINE = no live calls. Cost basis is used only when no cache exists.

label: cache_hours
notes: Fresh cache window for holdings prices.

label: fmp_api_key
notes: Secret value intentionally blank in secure release package; configure via secret store or environment.

label: alpha_vantage_api_key
notes: Secret value intentionally blank in secure release package; configure via secret store or environment.

label: net_worth_method
notes: pv_through_mortality_age OR cumulative_at_death

label: model_niit
notes: Apply 3.8% Net Investment Income Tax above MAGI threshold

label: model_state_estate_tax
notes: Model residence-state estate tax in addition to federal

label: capital_market_assumption_mode
notes: PRESET uses built-in horizon/preset assumptions; CUSTOM_FILE reads capital_market_assumptions.csv. Advanced users only.

label: capital_market_assumption_horizon_years
notes: Planning horizon for allocation optimizer assumptions. Supported: 1, 3, 5, 10, 20, 25, 30. 30 is the long-term baseline.

label: capital_market_assumption_preset
notes: CONSERVATIVE, BASELINE, or AGGRESSIVE. This shifts return/volatility assumptions before per-asset overrides.

label: use_custom_capital_market_file
notes: YES reads expert assumptions from custom_capital_market_file. Keep NO unless using a reviewed capital-market assumptions CSV.

label: custom_capital_market_file
notes: Expert CSV path with horizon_years,preset,asset_class,expected_return,volatility,stock_index_correlation.

label: correlation_assumption_mode
notes: PRESET uses low/moderate/high/stress correlation presets. ADVANCED also applies Asset Correlations rows. CUSTOM_FILE also reads asset_correlations.csv.

label: correlation_preset
notes: LOW, MODERATE, HIGH, or STRESS. Higher/stress correlations reduce diversification benefits.

label: use_custom_correlations_file
notes: YES reads expert pairwise correlations from custom_correlations_file.

label: custom_correlations_file
notes: Expert CSV path with horizon_years,preset,asset_class_a,asset_class_b,correlation.

label: expected_return
notes: Default 10.0%; optimizer return input for US Large Cap. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility
notes: Default 15.0%; optimizer risk input for US Large Cap.

notes: Default 10.5%; optimizer return input for US Mid Cap. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility
notes: Default 18.0%; optimizer risk input for US Mid Cap.

label: expected_return
notes: Default 11.5%; optimizer return input for US Small Cap. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility
notes: Default 22.0%; optimizer risk input for US Small Cap.

notes: Default 8.0%; optimizer return input for International. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility

label: expected_return
notes: Default 9.0%; optimizer return input for Emerging Markets. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility

label: expected_return
notes: Default 5.0%; optimizer return input for Commodities. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility
notes: Default 18.0%; optimizer risk input for Commodities.

label: expected_return
notes: Default 4.0%; optimizer return input for Bonds. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility

label: expected_return
notes: Default 3.5%; optimizer return input for Short-Term Bonds. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility
notes: Default 3.0%; optimizer risk input for Short-Term Bonds.

label: expected_return
notes: Default 4.0%; optimizer return input for TIPS. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility

label: expected_return
notes: Default 3.5%; optimizer return input for Municipal Bonds. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility

label: expected_return
notes: Default 6.0%; optimizer return input for Managed Futures. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility

label: expected_return
notes: Default 7.0%; optimizer return input for Private Credit. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility

label: expected_return
notes: Default 8.0%; optimizer return input for REITs. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility
notes: Default 19.0%; optimizer risk input for REITs.

label: expected_return
notes: Default 2.0%; optimizer return input for Cash. Affects recommended allocation only.

label: volatility

label: correlation
notes: Default example correlation between US Equity and Emerging Markets. Edit only in advanced/expert mode.

label: correlation
notes: Default example correlation between US Equity and Bonds. Edit only in advanced/expert mode.

label: correlation
notes: Default example correlation between US Equity and Managed Futures. Edit only in advanced/expert mode.

label: correlation
notes: Default example correlation between Bonds and TIPS. Edit only in advanced/expert mode.

label: correlation
notes: Default example correlation between Private Credit and US Equity. Edit only in advanced/expert mode.

label: trade_optimizer_mode
notes: GLOBAL_TAX_AWARE solves household-level drift/tax/location tradeoffs; HEURISTIC uses the prior account-by-account engine.

label: max_tax_cost_bps
notes: Maximum estimated realized-tax drag for ordinary taxable sales before deferral, unless drift/policy allows. 25 bps = 0.25% of sale amount.

label: min_trade_amount
notes: Suppresses small/noisy trades and false precision.

label: max_turnover_pct
notes: Maximum sell turnover recommended in one workbook cycle; controls excessive trading.

label: wash_sale_policy
notes: FLAG_ONLY adds review notes; AVOID_SAME_SYMBOL/STRICT_AVOID are conservative policy labels for review workflows.

label: allow_taxable_gain_sales
notes: NEVER, DRIFT_THRESHOLD, WITHIN_BUDGET, or ALWAYS. Controls whether allocation benefit can justify taxable gains.

label: asset_location_strength
notes: LIGHT/BALANCED/STRONG controls how aggressively Roth growth, pre-tax income, and taxable tax-efficient equity placement are preferred.

label: solver_fallback_policy
notes: If the global optimizer is infeasible/unavailable, HEURISTIC falls back to the previous tax-aware trade engine.

label: max_account_single_asset_pct
notes: Caps one ETF/fund within an account to reduce concentration caused by global optimization.

label: max_roth_high_growth_pct
notes: Caps growth/volatile sleeves inside Roth so tax efficiency does not create an uncomfortable Roth risk tilt.

label: max_pre_tax_fixed_income_pct
notes: Caps fixed-income concentration in pre-tax accounts to reduce future RMD/growth concentration risk.

label: max_trades_per_account
notes: Limits recommendation complexity and operational burden.

label: legacy_gain_deferral_pct
notes: Large embedded-gain taxable positions above this share are deferred unless settings are loosened.

label: taxable_gain_budget_annual
notes: Estimated annual tax-cost budget for recommended taxable gain sales; controls income timing/IRMAA/NIIT surprises.

label: ltcg_rate
notes: Long-term capital gains tax-rate input for trade optimization; adjust for your marginal situation.

label: max_tax_drag_pct
notes: Existing lot-level taxable sell screen limit used by the fallback and global engines.

label: force_taxable_sell_drift_pct
notes: Allows taxable gains when portfolio drift is large enough to outweigh deferral.

label: taxable_review_drift_pct
notes: Review threshold for moderate taxable drift.

label: drift_penalty_per_dollar
notes: Higher values prioritize target allocation completeness over tax/turnover/location penalties.

label: turnover_penalty_per_dollar
notes: Higher values suppress trades unless drift/location/tax-loss benefits justify turnover.

label: enabled
notes: NO keeps the Plan Chat UI/API feature disabled until AI chat implementation is intentionally re-enabled.

label: provider
notes: OPENAI uses ChatGPT/OpenAI API only when the named encrypted secret is configured; local fallback remains available.

label: openai_api_key
notes: Deprecated; plaintext Plan Chat keys in CSV are ignored. Store the key in the encrypted secrets store and reference it with openai_api_key_secret_name.

label: openai_api_key_secret_name
notes: Encrypted secrets-store entry containing the OpenAI API key.

label: openai_model
notes: OpenAI model for plan chat. Change as needed for your account.

label: max_context_chars
notes: Maximum generated plan context sent to ChatGPT or searched locally.

label: allow_local_fallback
notes: YES answers from local generated plan context if ChatGPT is not configured or fails.

label: plan_data_canonical_format
notes: CSV is authoritative. JSON/YAML exports must be regenerated and checksum-synchronized from CSV Plan Data.

label: plan_data_manifest
notes: Checksum manifest for canonical CSV Plan Data synchronization.

label: release_gate_version_grep
notes: Release gate scans user-visible surfaces and system_config.csv for stale version labels.

label: lan_auth_opt_out_ack
notes: Required YES to run LAN mode unauthenticated on 0.0.0.0. Use only on a trusted private LAN.

label: block_stale_tax_tables
notes: Advisor-ready status is blocked when tax table freshness warnings exist.

label: max_tax_table_lag_years
notes: Maximum permitted lag for federal/state/IRMAA/Social Security/RMD constants before blocking advisor-ready status.

label: require_assumption_signoff
notes: Assumption signoff is available as an advisor workflow but does not force illustration-only language by default.

label: output_status_mode
notes: Outputs show warnings and model-risk labels without mandatory illustration-until-signed language.

label: advisor_ready_max_fallback_value_pct
notes: Block advisor-ready status when fallback/stale pricing exceeds this share of priced holdings value.

label: require_consent
notes: Require per-request client consent before any context can be sent to a third-party AI provider.

label: redact_context
notes: Redact names, emails, phone numbers, and addresses before sending Plan Chat context to third-party AI.

label: max_build_seconds
notes: Maximum local workbook build runtime before timeout. Default is 30 minutes; increase for very large Advanced Exact Scalar Monte Carlo, sensitivity grids, or slower machines.
